description: Style Noteshorts are the coolest bottoms to wear in the current season - and perhaps the most versatile too. Slip into this pair when on a long journey, a casual day at home or at the gym. Pair them with sports shoes or flip flops to suit the occasion.Product DetailsNavy blue shorts with an elasticated waist that have a drawstring inside, two side pockets, embroidered brand logo below the left pocket and is engineered with Climalite technologyMaterial and Care70% Cotton and 30% PolyesterMachine wash at 40 degrees with like colours using a mild detergentDo not soak, tumble dry or bleachFlat dry in shadeCool iron do not iron on decorationsSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 6' and waist 32") is wearing a size M
